2025-2026.title: Discord Anti-Spam & Moderation Bot
2025-2026.name: Production-grade hybrid ML/Regex security system deployed on Cybera.
2025-2026.desc: A smart defense system built to stop the scams we all hate. Combines BERT transformer models with regex to process 1,000+ daily messages, featuring real-time analytics and automated threat mitigation.

2025-2026.title: AI Due Diligence Investment Analysis
2025-2026.name: UAIS x University of Alberta Innovation Fund (UA Fund)
2025-2026.desc: Partnering with the UA Innovation Fund, members gain real-world experience by conducting AI due diligence on startups, evaluating their technical and business viability for investment.

2025-2026.title: RAG-Based Chatbot for Lecture Notes
2025-2026.name: Beginner-friendly project on Retrieval-Augmented Generation.
2025-2026.desc: Build a personal AI study assistant. This chatbot processes uploaded lecture notes (PDFs) and uses a Large Language Model to answer questions, generate summaries, and provide explanations.

2025-2026.title: PalmPilot 2.0: Hand Gesture Controlled Laptop Automation
2025-2026.name: Intermediate project focused on computer vision and automation.
2025-2026.desc: Control your laptop using hand gestures! This project uses a webcam and computer vision to map real-time gestures to system commands like adjusting volume, switching tabs, or locking the screen.

2025-2026.title: Economic Drivers of Cryptocurrency Adoption
2025-2026.name: Analyzing macroeconomic conditions to understand cryptocurrency adoption.
2025-2026.desc: This project investigates whether macroeconomic conditions can predict cryptocurrency adoption by building an Economic Anxiety Index and testing its relationship with on-chain metrics.

2025-2026.title: Speech-Based Alzheimer AI Screening Tool
2025-2026.name: Advanced project in healthcare and Natural Language Processing.
2025-2026.desc: Develop an accessible app that uses a fine-tuned BERT model to estimate Alzheimer's prediction scores from short speech samples. Based on published research from the project lead.

2025-2026.title: AutoExec Club Bot
2025-2026.name: Intermediate project building agentic AI systems for student clubs.
2025-2026.desc: Create a Discord bot to automate administrative tasks for student clubs. Using LangChain and the Model Context Protocol, it will integrate with tools like Google Calendar, Sheets, and Notion.

2024-2025.title: NHL Positivity Index
2024-2025.name: Using NLP and sentiment analysis to quantify the sentiment of NHL fanbases.
2024-2025.desc: This project aims to quantitatively assess how positive or negative an NHL fanbase feels over a given period using natural language processing and sentiment analysis to analyze fan discussions on Reddit.

2024-2025.title: Intelligent Assistant Bot
2024-2025.name: Automated administration and RAG support for 700+ members.
2024-2025.desc: A multifunctional Discord bot that automated event RSVPs and provided AI-powered technical support using GPT-4o, reducing moderator workload by 60%.

2024-2025.title: AI Due Diligence Investment Analysis
2024-2025.name: UAIS x University of Alberta Innovation Fund (2024 Cohort)
2024-2025.desc: The inaugural cohort partnering with the UA Innovation Fund to conduct early-stage AI assessments on startups, establishing the framework for future collaboration.
